SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init

Interface POExtension

All Known Implementing Classes:
FinalFieldsPOExtension, TruthValuePOExtension
public interface POExtension
Instances of this interface are used to customize and extend the behavior of a ProofOblInput.

Implementations are instantiated once via ProofInitServiceUtil.createOperationPOExtension() and reused all the time. This means that POExtension are singletons and should not have a state.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    isPOSupported(ProofOblInput po)
    Checks if the given ProofOblInput is supported.
    JTerm
    modifyPostTerm(AbstractOperationPO abstractOperationPO, InitConfig proofConfig, Services services, ProgramVariable selfTerm, JTerm postTerm)
    Modifies the post condition.

  • Method Details

    • isPOSupported

      boolean isPOSupported(ProofOblInput po)
      Checks if the given ProofOblInput is supported.
      Parameters:
      po - The ProofOblInput to check.
      Returns:
      true is supported, false is not supported.

    • modifyPostTerm

      JTerm modifyPostTerm(AbstractOperationPO abstractOperationPO, InitConfig proofConfig, Services services, ProgramVariable selfTerm, JTerm postTerm)
      Modifies the post condition.
      Parameters:
      abstractOperationPO - The proof obligation for which the mdification is done
      proofConfig - The InitConfig to use.
      services - The Services to use.
      selfTerm - The ProgramVariable representing the current receiver object.
      postTerm - The post condition to modify.
      Returns:
      The modified post condition or the original post condition if no modifications were performed.
